initial_candidates.sql:
WITH daily_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        DATE(txn_date) AS txn_day,
        SUM(CASE WHEN txn_type = 'deposit' THEN txn_amount ELSE -txn_amount END) AS daily_balance
    FROM customer_transactions
    GROUP BY customer_id, DATE(txn_date)
),
running_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        txn_day,
        SUM(daily_balance) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY txn_day ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS running_balance
    FROM daily_balances
),
rolling_averages AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        txn_day,
        running_balance,
        AVG(running_balance) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY txn_day ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS rolling_avg_balance
    FROM running_balances
),
filtered_rolling AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        txn_day,
        running_balance,
        CASE 
            WHEN COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY txn_day ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) >= 30 
            THEN MAX(0, rolling_avg_balance) 
            ELSE NULL 
        END AS rolling_avg_balance_filtered
    FROM rolling_averages
),
monthly_max AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        strftime('%Y', txn_day) AS year_number,
        strftime('%m', txn_day) AS month_number,
        MAX(rolling_avg_balance_filtered) AS max_30day_avg_balance
    FROM filtered_rolling
    WHERE rolling_avg_balance_filtered IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY customer_id, strftime('%Y', txn_day), strftime('%m', txn_day)
),
customer_first_month AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        MIN(strftime('%Y', txn_day)) || '-' || MIN(strftime('%m', txn_day)) AS first_month
    FROM filtered_rolling
    WHERE rolling_avg_balance_filtered IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY customer_id
),
final_results AS (
    SELECT 
        mm.year_number,
        mm.month_number,
        SUM(mm.max_30day_avg_balance) AS total_max_30day_avg_balance
    FROM monthly_max mm
    JOIN customer_first_month cfm 
        ON mm.customer_id = cfm.customer_id 
        AND NOT (mm.year_number || '-' || mm.month_number = cfm.first_month)
    GROUP BY mm.year_number, mm.month_number
)
SELECT 
    year_number,
    month_number,
    total_max_30day_avg_balance
FROM final_results
ORDER BY year_number, month_number;

WITH daily_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        DATE(txn_date) AS txn_day,
        SUM(CASE WHEN txn_type = 'deposit' THEN txn_amount ELSE -txn_amount END) AS daily_balance
    FROM customer_transactions
    GROUP BY customer_id, DATE(txn_date)
),
running_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        txn_day,
        SUM(daily_balance) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY txn_day ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS running_balance
    FROM daily_balances
),
rolling_averages AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        txn_day,
        running_balance,
        AVG(running_balance) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY txn_day ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS rolling_avg_balance
    FROM running_balances
),
adjusted_averages AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        txn_day,
        running_balance,
        CASE 
            WHEN COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY txn_day ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) >= 30 
            THEN MAX(0, rolling_avg_balance)
            ELSE NULL 
        END AS adjusted_rolling_avg
    FROM rolling_averages
),
customer_first_month AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        strftime('%Y', MIN(txn_day)) AS first_year,
        strftime('%m', MIN(txn_day)) AS first_month
    FROM daily_balances
    GROUP BY customer_id
),
monthly_max_averages AS (
    SELECT 
        aa.customer_id,
        strftime('%Y', aa.txn_day) AS year_number,
        strftime('%m', aa.txn_day) AS month_number,
        MAX(aa.adjusted_rolling_avg) AS max_30day_avg_balance
    FROM adjusted_averages aa
    JOIN customer_first_month cfm ON aa.customer_id = cfm.customer_id
    WHERE NOT (strftime('%Y', aa.txn_day) = cfm.first_year AND strftime('%m', aa.txn_day) = cfm.first_month)
    GROUP BY aa.customer_id, strftime('%Y', aa.txn_day), strftime('%m', aa.txn_day)
)
SELECT 
    year_number,
    month_number,
    SUM(max_30day_avg_balance) AS total_max_30day_avg_balance
FROM monthly_max_averages
GROUP BY year_number, month_number
ORDER BY year_number, month_number;

WITH daily_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        DATE(txn_date) AS txn_day,
        SUM(CASE WHEN txn_type = 'deposit' THEN txn_amount ELSE -txn_amount END) AS daily_net
    FROM customer_transactions
    GROUP BY customer_id, DATE(txn_date)
),
running_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        txn_day,
        SUM(daily_net) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY txn_day ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS running_balance
    FROM daily_balances
),
rolling_averages AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        txn_day,
        running_balance,
        AVG(running_balance) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY txn_day ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS rolling_avg_balance
    FROM running_balances
),
adjusted_averages AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        txn_day,
        CASE 
            WHEN COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY txn_day ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) >= 30 
            THEN MAX(0, rolling_avg_balance)
            ELSE NULL 
        END AS adjusted_rolling_avg
    FROM rolling_averages
),
monthly_max AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        strftime('%Y', txn_day) AS year_number,
        strftime('%m', txn_day) AS month_number,
        MAX(adjusted_rolling_avg) AS max_30day_avg_balance
    FROM adjusted_averages
    WHERE adjusted_rolling_avg IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY customer_id, strftime('%Y', txn_day), strftime('%m', txn_day)
),
customer_first_month AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        MIN(strftime('%Y', txn_day)) || '-' || MIN(strftime('%m', txn_day)) AS first_month
    FROM rolling_averages
    GROUP BY customer_id
),
filtered_monthly_max AS (
    SELECT 
        mm.customer_id,
        mm.year_number,
        mm.month_number,
        mm.max_30day_avg_balance
    FROM monthly_max mm
    JOIN customer_first_month cfm 
        ON mm.customer_id = cfm.customer_id 
        AND (mm.year_number || '-' || mm.month_number) > cfm.first_month
)
SELECT 
    year_number,
    month_number,
    SUM(max_30day_avg_balance) AS total_max_30day_avg_balance
FROM filtered_monthly_max
GROUP BY year_number, month_number
ORDER BY year_number, month_number;

WITH daily_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        DATE(txn_date) AS txn_day,
        SUM(CASE WHEN txn_type = 'deposit' THEN txn_amount ELSE -txn_amount END) AS daily_net
    FROM customer_transactions
    GROUP BY customer_id, DATE(txn_date)
),
running_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        txn_day,
        SUM(daily_net) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY txn_day ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS running_balance
    FROM daily_balances
),
rolling_averages AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        txn_day,
        running_balance,
        AVG(running_balance) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY txn_day ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS rolling_avg_balance,
        COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY txn_day ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS days_in_window
    FROM running_balances
),
filtered_averages AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        txn_day,
        running_balance,
        CASE WHEN days_in_window >= 30 THEN MAX(0, rolling_avg_balance) ELSE NULL END AS rolling_avg_balance
    FROM rolling_averages
),
monthly_max AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        CAST(strftime('%Y', txn_day) AS INTEGER) AS year_number,
        CAST(strftime('%m', txn_day) AS INTEGER) AS month_number,
        MAX(rolling_avg_balance) AS max_30day_avg_balance
    FROM filtered_averages
    WHERE rolling_avg_balance IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY customer_id, year_number, month_number
),
customer_first_month AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        MIN(year_number * 12 + month_number) AS first_month_num
    FROM monthly_max
    GROUP BY customer_id
),
filtered_monthly_max AS (
    SELECT 
        mm.customer_id,
        mm.year_number,
        mm.month_number,
        mm.max_30day_avg_balance
    FROM monthly_max mm
    JOIN customer_first_month cfm 
        ON mm.customer_id = cfm.customer_id 
        AND (mm.year_number * 12 + mm.month_number) > cfm.first_month_num
)
SELECT 
    year_number,
    month_number,
    SUM(max_30day_avg_balance) AS total_max_30day_avg_balance
FROM filtered_monthly_max
GROUP BY year_number, month_number
ORDER BY year_number, month_number;

WITH daily_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        DATE(txn_date) AS txn_day,
        SUM(CASE WHEN txn_type = 'deposit' THEN txn_amount ELSE -txn_amount END) AS daily_net

    GROUP BY customer_id, DATE(txn_date)
),
running_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        txn_day,
        SUM(daily_net) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY txn_day ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS running_balance
    FROM daily_balances
),
rolling_averages AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        txn_day,
        running_balance,
        AVG(running_balance) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY txn_day ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS rolling_avg_balance
    FROM running_balances
),
adjusted_averages AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        txn_day,
        CASE 
            WHEN COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY txn_day ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) >= 30 
            THEN MAX(0, rolling_avg_balance)

monthly_max AS (

    FROM adjusted_averages

customer_first_month AS (

filtered_monthly_max AS (

)

    month_number,
    SUM(max_30day_avg_balance) AS total_max_30day_avg_balance
